message:
fix: selfNukePolecat verifies remote push + RemoveWithOptions checks open MRs

selfNukePolecat now verifies the branch exists on at least one remote
before nuking the worktree. In rigs with no git remote (like sky), this
prevents data loss by preserving the worktree.

RemoveWithOptions now checks for open merge requests in the agent bead
even in nuclear mode (unless --force). This prevents accidental removal
of worktrees whose MRs are still being processed by the Refinery.

Also adds public ClonePath() accessor on polecat.Manager.

Fixes: gt-46tw0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
